---
title: "Team"
---

Our lab consists of **2 PhD candidates** and **3 Engineering Doctorate (EngD) students**, all supervised jointly by researchers from Kadaster and the University of Twente.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## PhD Candidates

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### Lexi Rowland
**PhD Candidate** · University of Twente

Security and privacy-aware virtual knowledge graphs — ontology-based policy enforcement and LLM integration.

[a.c.s.j.rowland@utwente.nl](mailto:a.c.s.j.rowland@utwente.nl)
[Project: Security & Privacy-Aware VKGs](projects/security-privacy-vkg.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### Anagha Phaniraj
**PhD Candidate** · University of Twente

Improving LLM pre-training and interpretability using knowledge graphs for land administration domain reasoning.

[anagha.phaniraj@utwente.nl](mailto:anagha.phaniraj@utwente.nl)
[Project: LLM Enhancement via Knowledge Graphs](projects/llm-knowledge-graphs.qmd)
:::

:::

## EngD Students

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Sven Mol
**Engineering Doctorate** · University of Twente

VKG infrastructure design, federated querying, and performance evaluation for legacy systems at Kadaster.

[s.mol@utwente.nl](mailto:s.mol@utwente.nl)
[Project: VKGs for Legacy Systems](projects/vkg-legacy-systems.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Lei Wang
**Engineering Doctorate** · University of Twente

KG-enhanced LLM chatbot for natural language access to land administration information.

[lei.wang@utwente.nl](mailto:lei.wang@utwente.nl)
[Project: LLM & KG Chatbot](projects/llm-kg-chatbot.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Stefan Bussemaker
**Engineering Doctorate** · University of Twente

Transparent AI system design for automated information extraction from notarial deeds.

[s.bussemaker@utwente.nl](mailto:s.bussemaker@utwente.nl)
[Project: AI Extraction from Notarial Deeds](projects/ai-notarial-deeds.qmd)
:::

:::

## Supervisors

**Kadaster**

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Erwin Folmer
**Lector** Applied Data Science & AI · HAN
[Erwin.Folmer@han.nl](mailto:Erwin.Folmer@han.nl)
:::

:::

**University of Twente — Geo-Information Processing (GIP)**

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Mahdi Farnaghi
**Assistant Professor**
[m.farnaghi@utwente.nl](mailto:m.farnaghi@utwente.nl)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Frank Ostermann
**Associate Professor**
[f.o.ostermann@utwente.nl](mailto:f.o.ostermann@utwente.nl)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Raul Zurita Milla
**Full Professor**
[r.zurita-milla@utwente.nl](mailto:r.zurita-milla@utwente.nl)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Rob Lemmens
**Assistant Professor**
[r.l.g.lemmens@utwente.nl](mailto:r.l.g.lemmens@utwente.nl)
:::

:::

**University of Twente — Semantics, Cybersecurity & Services (SCS)**

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Tiago Prince Sales
**Assistant Professor**
[t.princesales@utwente.nl](mailto:t.princesales@utwente.nl)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Giancarlo Guizzardi
**Full Professor**
[g.guizzardi@utwente.nl](mailto:g.guizzardi@utwente.nl)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Luiz Bonino da Silva Santos
**Associate Professor**
[l.o.boninodasilvasantos@utwente.nl](mailto:l.o.boninodasilvasantos@utwente.nl)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3}
#### Thijs van Ede
**Assistant Professor**
[t.s.vanede@utwente.nl](mailto:t.s.vanede@utwente.nl)
:::

:::

:::
